items.name_en: Chanel 24B Shell Bag 🐚
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Shell Bag 🐚
Size: 15*20*6cm, Medium Black Faux Fur
The 24B Spring/Summer new oil-waxed sheepskin shell bag is a dazzling highlight this season. The bag body features shiny sheepskin that is beautifully bright, combining practicality and beauty. It has a unique charm, blending fashion and sophistication. Although it doesn't fit a phone, the capacity is still okay, and there is a card slot inside. The leather chain handle is very comfortable to carry. Ladies who haven't got one yet, hurry up and get it!
Style No. AS5130

items.name_en: Chanel 24B Velvet Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Velvet Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
🖤This season's little dark horse🖤 No girl would refuse this bag, unless she hasn't fallen in love with it enough yet❗️❗️ It really has great texture. I absolutely adore it at first sight. In my eyes, it is both fashionable and cute. I really can't praise it enough✌️✌️ The actual product is just incredibly, incredibly, incredibly, incredibly good-looking. It looks perfect from every angle💕💕 The shine is just right. This small bag is exquisite whether carried by hand or worn crossbody or on the shoulder, while full of vintage vibes🫶🫶 Go for it! Besties, buy it now❗️❗️❗️❗️
Size: 15*20*6cm
Model: AS5130

items.name_en: Chanel 24c Collector's Series
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24c Collector's Series
Size: 15.5x25.5x6.5(cm)
New 24c pearl flap bag
This is the most beautiful pearl CF of the season ✔️
Velvet surface inlaid with many crystal pearls of various sizes ⚪️
Plus sparkling crystal sequins, bling✨bling, making it exceptionally dazzling 👀
Mini double C logo inlaid in the pearl quilted pattern, truly the finishing touch 🐲
Instantly elevates the entire bag's noble quality! With the vintage woven metal chain strap, it is small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restored to the look of a ZP
Multiple carrying styles: can be worn as a backpack, shoulder bag, or handbag. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️

items.name_en: Chanel 24C Double Gold Ball AS2649: Went inside to see the seasonal model. The cute SA told me the most popular double gold ball mini is here. Let's do a comparison. Size: Two are almost the same, both are super practical sizes! Can hold a phone, keys, card holder, makeup, etc. Super practical! The double gold ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is about the same. Material: Both are cowhide, durable but the hand feel is completely different. The previous cat-eye season model is softer (my favorite texture), more casual and relaxed. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite double gold ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more shiny, and the side looks more like a Boy bag. Square, because this one is stiffer, so even though it's thicker than the season model, the capacity is actually about the same. I prefer the soft cowhide of the season model for the texture. Chain: The double gold ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm

items.name_en: Chanel 24K Box Bag Black In Stock | Large Batch Real Photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24K Box Bag Black In Stock | Large Batch Real Photos
A makeup box bag that caught my eye at first glance in the display cabinet, elegant and neat, holding it is simply too beautiful!! Elegant and noble, can serve as various collector's series composite makeup box bags, body features double C logo! Vintage retro style is full ✨✨🖤 Capacity is also okay, suitable for various occasions, can be crossbody or handheld!! Original factory sheepskin worth buying!!
Size: 12.5×18×6.5cm
Model: AS5167
